notes: Soichi dinner, date-night. Fitted black AllSaints knit + wide leg dark indigo jeans + black Chelsea boots + black belt + Senpo blush crochet bag. Silhouette is excellent — fitted top/wide leg is perfectly balanced. DA deduction: all clothing pieces are cool/neutral (black + indigo), zero warm DA colors in the garments themselves. Saved by yellow gold hardware on belt and bag which pull warmth back in. The Senpo bag functions as the sole focal point and soft contrast. Upgrade path: swap indigo jeans for warm camel or dark olive trousers, or replace black top with chocolate/burgundy knit — either change would push this to a 9/10 DA look.
